ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the axis to which the command is applied */,
  "command_type" INTEGER /* Type of the command (e.g., move, rotate) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the command execution */,
  "acc_time" REAL /* Acceleration time for the command */,
  "dec_time" REAL /* Deceleration time for the command */,
  "torque_limit" INTEGER /* Torque limit for the command */,
  "ext_ctrl_bit_0" INTEGER /* External control bit 0 (used for real-time control) */,
  "reserved_word" INTEGER /* Reserved word for future use or specific commands */,
  "coord1" REAL /* Coordinate 1 for the command */,
  "coord2" REAL /* Coordinate 2 for the command */,
  "coord3" REAL /* Coordinate 3 for the command */,
  "sub_index" INTEGER /* Sub-index for the command (used for multi-axis commands) */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot executing the command */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the command */,
  "overrideable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command can be overridden */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the command */,
  "executed_by_robot_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was executed by the robot */,
  "external_input" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command was triggered by an external input */,
  "command_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_command_type FOREIGN KEY ("command_type") REFERENCES command_types ("command_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_axis_id FOREIGN KEY ("axis_id") REFERENCES axes ("axis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axes" (
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axis */,
  "axis_name" TEXT /* Name of the axis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the axis */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed the axis can achieve */,
  "max_torque" INTEGER /* Maximum torque the axis can handle */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed the axis can achieve */,
  "min_torque" INTEGER /* Minimum torque the axis can handle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the axis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_types" (
  "command_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command type */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command type */,
  "min_speed" REAL /* Minimum speed for the command type */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed for the command type */,
  "min_torque" INTEGER /* Minimum torque for the command type */,
  "max_torque" INTEGER /* Maximum torque for the command type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the command type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being logged */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the command execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who executed the command */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot executing the command */,
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the axis involved in the command */,
  "command_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_axis_id FOREIGN KEY ("axis_id") REFERENCES axes ("axis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., technician, supervisor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the robot was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the robot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robot (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the robot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_axes" (
  "robot_axis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot-axis relationship */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the axis controlled by the robot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_axis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_axes_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_axes_axis_id FOREIGN KEY ("axis_id") REFERENCES axes ("axis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_overrides" (
  "override_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being overridden */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the override */,
  "override_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the override was performed */,
  "override_description" TEXT /* Description of the override */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot involved in the override */,
  "command_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the override was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the override */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_overrides_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_overrides_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_overrides_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being measured */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command started execution */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command completed execution */,
  "actual_speed" REAL /* Actual speed achieved during execution */,
  "actual_torque" INTEGER /* Actual torque used during execution */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if any errors occurred during execution */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot involved in the metric */,
  "axis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the axis involved in the metric */,
  "command_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_axis_id FOREIGN KEY ("axis_id") REFERENCES axes ("axis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)
